world_contract.description: An industrial warehouse storage aisle with heavy shelving where a humanoid robot carries a cardboard box and interacts with an unpredictable human worker under CCTV-style surveillance.

locked_entities.appearance: Sleek matte-white humanoid robot, 1.7 meters tall, with charcoal-grey joint articulation caps, a glossy black glass visor head with no facial features, and a metallic-silver chest panel.
locked_entities.material: matte-white polycarbonate, charcoal-grey polymer, glossy black tempered glass, brushed aluminum chest panel

locked_entities.appearance: Adult human male worker wearing a high-visibility neon-yellow safety vest over a dark navy blue long-sleeve shirt, grey work trousers, black work boots, and a yellow hard hat.
locked_entities.material: high-visibility polyester fabric, cotton shirt, heavy denim pants, leather boots, hard plastic hard hat

locked_entities.appearance: Plain light-brown corrugated cardboard box, cube-shaped, 0.4 meters per side, sealed with a single strip of clear packing tape across the top center, with no markings or logos.
Industrial storage rack, 3.0 meters tall, featuring safety-orange heavy-duty horizontal steel beams and dark-blue vertical upright steel frames, loaded with wooden pallets holding brown boxes.
locked_entities.material: powder-coated structural steel, pine wood pallets, cardboard container boxes

locked_entities.appearance: Industrial storage rack, 3.0 meters tall, featuring safety-orange heavy-duty horizontal steel beams and dark-blue vertical upright steel frames, loaded with wooden pallets holding brown boxes.
locked_entities.material: powder-coated structural steel, pine wood pallets, cardboard container boxes

locked_environment.layout: A narrow straight warehouse aisle of width 1.8 meters, bordered symmetrically by 3.0-meter tall industrial storage racks (storage_shelf_01 on left, storage_shelf_02 on right). Floor has safety-yellow painted boundary lines.
locked_environment.floor: Polished light-grey industrial concrete warehouse floor showing faint scuffs, wheel track marks, and high-gloss reflection under lights.
locked_environment.lighting: Overhead high-bay LED warehouse lighting, cool white 5000K, creating crisp but soft shadows on the floor and even illumination throughout the aisle.
locked_environment.style: Realistic CCTV surveillance footage, overhead static angle, high-resolution industrial monitor feed, natural color grading, minimal cinematic bloom.

object_registry.shape_signature: bipedal humanoid structure, 1.7m height, broad flat shoulders, cylindrical limbs, spherical head visor
object_registry.material_signature: semi-glossy white plastic casing, metallic silver chest, dark grey rubber-like flexible joint gaskets
object_registry.color_signature: matte pure white (RAL 9003) main panels, anthracite grey (RAL 7016) joint caps, jet black visor
object_registry.surface_details: seamless panel gaps, metallic charging pin contacts on lower back, small white power status LED on upper chest
object_registry.scale_signature: height exactly equal to 0.56 times the height of storage_shelf_01 (1.7 meters out of 3.0 meters)
negative_drift: robot color shifting to grey or metallic silver instead of matte white
robot head developing visible cameras or eyes beneath the black visor
limbs turning into wheels or losing bipedal design mid-walk

object_registry.shape_signature: standing adult human male, medium athletic build, height approximately 1.8 meters
object_registry.material_signature: non-reflective polyester vest fabric, cotton shirt cloth, durable denim, thick matte plastic hardhat
object_registry.color_signature: safety neon-yellow (vest), navy blue (shirt), charcoal grey (trousers), safety yellow (hardhat)
object_registry.surface_details: retroreflective grey silver horizontal stripes on the safety vest, scuff marks on the knees of trousers
object_registry.scale_signature: height slightly taller than humanoid_robot_01, shoulder width approximately 0.45 meters
negative_drift: worker vest changing color to orange or red
worker losing hard hat during rapid movements
shirt color morphing to black or light blue

object_registry.shape_signature: perfect regular cube with sharp vertices, dimensions 0.4m x 0.4m x 0.4m
object_registry.material_signature: uncoated kraft cardboard paper texture, light-absorbing surface, shiny clear plastic tape center strip
object_registry.color_signature: natural kraft light brown, semi-translucent shiny adhesive tape
object_registry.surface_details: subtle corrugation ribs visible under high-angle lighting, minor flap crease lines on top surface
object_registry.scale_signature: fits comfortably between the two manipulator hands of humanoid_robot_01, width matching robot shoulder width
negative_drift: box morphing into a rectangular block or losing sharp edges
fictional shipping labels or black text printing appearing on the cardboard sides
box changing color to dark brown or white

scene_registry.layout_signature: parallel vertical racking systems forming a symmetrical central corridor aisle of 1.8m width
scene_registry.background_signature: light-grey concrete floor, orange and blue racks fading into deep perspective background, floor markings parallel to shelves
scene_registry.lighting_signature: harsh overhead fluorescent grid, cool-white tone, high contrast floor shadow immediately beneath actors
scene_registry.spatial_map: aisle bounds from x=-0.9 to x=0.9; storage racks situated at x<-0.9 and x>0.9; robot moves along y-axis from y=-3.0 to y=3.0
negative_drift: aisle width changing dynamically during robot navigation
shelves switching colors from orange/blue to all-grey or green
floor texture swapping to dark asphalt or wooden planks
lighting changing to warm yellow or sunset volumetric rays

reference_assets.description: High-resolution master canvas showing the top-down overhead perspective of the complete warehouse aisle, empty of moving actors.
Isolated high-resolution top-down ortho view of the humanoid robot standing upright with arms holding a spatial volume.
Isolated high-resolution top-down view of the worker walking, establishing the yellow hardhat and safety vest boundaries.
The initial frame of the video with the humanoid robot at y=-2.0 carrying the box, and the human worker partially concealed behind shelf_02 at y=1.0.

identity_checks.method: RGB histogram and mask matching of the robot's limbs and torso across all keyframes.
identity_checks.pass_condition: Color variation of white panels remains within Delta E < 3.0 relative to the reference_assets.

identity_checks.method: Structural line detection (Hough transform) tracking rack edge alignment across all video frames.
identity_checks.pass_condition: Shelving alignment lines maintain a static parallel perspective with less than 1% pixel displacement.

identity_checks.method: VLM classification check verifying the presence of the yellow hard hat on the worker's head throughout the duration.
identity_checks.pass_condition: Hard hat identified on human head coordinates in 100% of visible video frames.

forbidden_changes: Never alter the floor material, lighting direction, or physical dimensions of the storage racks.
Never change the primary color scheme of the robot (white, grey, black) or the worker (neon-yellow vest, blue shirt).
Never add additional main actors such as forklift vehicles or extra human workers.
Do not change the camera focal length or translate the camera position; the camera must remain completely static overhead.
consistency_requirements: The cardboard box must remain held by the robot until a collision or a drop event is triggered.
The spatial dimensions of the aisle must be identical across any generated scenarios.
Surveillance overlay elements (like recording indicator, timestamps) must be identical or mathematically sequential across variations.
The physical scale of the humanoid robot must remain constant relative to the floor grid markings.
